_meta.description: 1688 search terms for all blue ocean AliExpress categories. Task 1 uses these to discover products.

RetroHairClips.notes: Retro-style hair clips — structurally brand-safe, high Etsy demand

PunkHairAccessories.notes: Punk/gothic hair accessories — spikes, skull clips, safety-pin barrettes

VintageHeadbands.notes: Vintage/boho style headbands — wide fabric, knotted, floral

RetroBodyChain.notes: Retro/boho body/waist chains — strong Etsy seller, brand-safe

VintageBrooches.notes: Vintage brooches & enamel lapel pins — safe if original (non-character) designs

PunkJewelryFindings.notes: Punk rivet/spike/chain components — jewelry findings, structurally brand-impossible

RetroKeychains.notes: Retro-themed keychains (cassettes, cameras, vintage motifs) — brand-safe

RetroPhoneCases.notes: Retro/punk/gothic phone cases — no brand logos, style-driven designs

PunkPatches.notes: Punk embroidered patches & iron-ons — craft supply, massive Etsy category

RetroPatches.notes: Vintage-style embroidered patches — Etsy craft supply staple

VintageWashiTape.notes: Vintage pattern washi/masking tape — Etsy craft supply, zero brand risk

GothicCandles.notes: Gothic/skull/dark aesthetic candles — trending Etsy home decor

VintageJournals.notes: Vintage leather-bound journals & notebooks — Etsy giftable

SteampunkAccessories.notes: Steampunk goggles, gear jewelry, cog accessories — niche but high AOV on Etsy

RetroEnamelPins.notes: Original-design enamel/lapel pins — NOT character/anime (those have IP risk)

PunkChokers.notes: Punk/gothic chokers — generic chain/leather/spike designs, no brand overlap

PunkEarrings.notes: Punk/gothic earrings — skull, spike, chain designs. Zero luxury brand overlap.

RetroEarrings.notes: Retro/boho earrings — vintage geometric, ethnic, artisan style

PunkRings.notes: Punk/gothic skull/snake/claw rings — no luxury brand overlap

BohoAnklets.notes: Bohemian/retro anklets — beaded, woven, shell — brand-safe

RetroSocks.notes: Retro pattern/art socks — no logos, style-driven designs only

VintageCoinPurses.notes: Vintage clasp/kiss-lock coin purses — brand-safe small accessories

RetroToteBags.notes: Retro/artsy canvas tote bags — no brand logos, art prints only

GothicHomeDecor.notes: Gothic/dark aesthetic home decor — skull figures, dark ornaments — Etsy trending
